name: Bailey's Irish Cream #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 14 oz condensed milk, sweetened with 2 tsp glycerine.
2. Add 1 1/2 cups Irish whiskey and 1 tbsp water.
3. Stir in 1 tbsp vanilla extract.
4. Whisk all ingredients together until well combined for approximately 10 minutes.
5. Store the mixture in the refrigerator. It will keep for 4-5 months.
